title: The Conquering Horde
writer: Emerson Hough, Grover Jones, William Slavens McNutt
actors: Richard Arlen, Fay Wray, Claude Gillingwater
plot: Not long after the Civil War, Texas cattle ranchers realize they have a problem: the Union Pacific railroad is bypassing their state and making it nearly impossible to get their cattle to market. Many ranchers are being forced to ...
